Why_They_Matter: 250K+ daily makers and builders viewing products
Pitch_Angle: P1 templates get featured in maker tools collection. P2 writing service appeals to bootstrapped founders launching products.
Outreach_Template: Hi ProductHunt partnerships team, I'm launching SaaS founder templates and writing services on Gumroad. They're built for makers and would resonate with PH audience. Can we discuss affiliate partnership or featured placement? Reply to this email or let me know best contact.

Why_They_Matter: 8K+ active bootstrapped founders who are our target customers
Pitch_Angle: Publish guest post: 'How I Built 3 SaaS Products with Templates' - positions us as founder, P1/P2 both appeal to IH audience.
Contact_Method: Email to founder or post in community
Outreach_Template: Subject: Guest post idea for Indie Hackers - [Founder name], I have an audience of SaaS founders and want to contribute to IH community. I can write a guest post: 'The template playbook I use for every SaaS launch' (real templates from my products, audience gets actual value). Interested? I can draft it this week.

Pitch_Angle: Post templates + pricing in weekly 'Promo thread' with discount code. Positions us as founder sharing tools, not just selling.
Expected_Outcome: 10-20 clicks from one post + some conversions
Contact_Method: Reddit modmail or comment in megathread
Outreach_Template: Hi r/entrepreneurs mods, I'm launching SaaS templates and a writing service retainer for bootstrapped founders. Happy to post in the weekly promo thread with discount code. No spam, just sharing tools I've built. Anything I should know about posting?

Why_They_Matter: 2M+ Substack readers interested in creator economy, indie projects
Pitch_Angle: P1 templates and P2 writing service relevant to newsletter creators. Affiliate commission on P1 sales, P2 leads.
Expected_Outcome: Affiliate clicks when featured in relevant newsletters
Contact_Method: Email to Substack partnerships or individual writers
Outreach_Template: Hi [Creator name], I'm launching SaaS templates and content writing services for founders. Your audience overlaps with ours (people building in public). I'm offering 20% affiliate commission on P1 sales if you recommend to your audience. Interested?

Why_They_Matter: 5K+ downloads per episode, audience is bootstrapped founders and solopreneurs
Pitch_Angle: Interview topic: 'Building multiple revenue streams without burnout - the 3-stream playbook' Positions us as founder expert, P2 leads inbound after episode.
Expected_Outcome: 1-2 qualified P2 leads + credibility boost + affiliate awareness
Outreach_Template: Hi Jordan, I'm running a 3-stream revenue model (digital products, freelance writing, affiliate sites) and hitting $10K revenue goal in 90 days. Thought your audience would love the real numbers + failures + what worked. Interested in having me on [date range]?

Why_They_Matter: 500K+ creator accounts, P3 content will recommend ConvertKit for email
Pitch_Angle: Affiliate recommendation in P3 email marketing review article. Commission on signups.
Outreach_Template: Hi ConvertKit affiliate team, I'm launching an affiliate site reviewing email tools for SaaS founders. ConvertKit will be one of our top recommendations. I'd like to join your affiliate program. My site: [link when live]. Commission rate?

Why_They_Matter: 30K+ Twitter followers in SaaS space, active in SaaS discussions
Pitch_Angle: Retweet and engage with our content. Potential cross-promotion of SaaS templates on his audience.
Expected_Outcome: Organic reach amplification + credibility by association
Outreach_Template: Hi Andrew, I'm launching SaaS-focused templates and content services for founders. Noticed you're active in SaaS Twitter. Would love to collaborate on content - either co-creation or cross-promotion. Let me know if interested.

Expected_Outcome: Affiliate partnership: 30% commission on our P1 sales if they recommend to their audience.
Contact_Method: 10-50 clicks per creator, 1-2 sales per creator per month
column12: Hi [creator name], I'm launching SaaS templates on Gumroad (P1). Your audience (people building templates) overlaps with my potential customers. I'm offering 30% affiliate commission on all sales through your link. Interested?

Pitch_Angle: Share post: 'How I'm building 3-stream revenue model (templates, writing, affiliate)' Real numbers, transparent, authentic.
column13: Post title: 'Show HN: I'm building a 3-stream SaaS revenue model (templates, freelance, affiliate) - $X revenue, $Y costs, here's what I'm learning' (share real metrics, transparent failures, actual playbooks)

Why_They_Matter: 8K+ Twitter followers interested in indie projects
Pitch_Angle: Weekly tweets engaging with indie projects, sharing templates. Build authority by engaging authentically.
Expected_Outcome: 10-20 followers per week + inbound DMs from interested founders
Outreach_Template: 1. Reply to indie founder tweets with relevant advice (not promotions). 2. Share real metrics from your own journey (template sales, client wins). 3. When relevant, mention templates/services as solutions.

Why_They_Matter: 1K-10K listeners per episode in marketing/content space
Pitch_Angle: Interview: 'Content marketing for SaaS founders on a bootstrap budget' P2 writing service is angle.
Expected_Outcome: 1-2 qualified leads per appearance + podcast credibility
Outreach_Template: Hi [Host], I've bootstrapped SaaS products and now run a content writing service for founders. I have real stories about content ROI (revenue, failures, optimization). Would make a good episode for your audience. Available [dates]?

Why_They_Matter: Selling Notion templates on Gumroad, overlapping audience
Pitch_Angle: Affiliate partnership: 20% commission on our P1 (Notion templates) if they recommend.
Outreach_Template: Hi [Creator], I'm launching Notion templates on Gumroad. Your audience (people using Notion) would benefit from [specific template]. I can offer 20% affiliate commission. Link: [Gumroad]

Pitch_Angle: Sponsor monthly founder matching conversations where P2 writing service gets mentioned as resource for new founders.
Expected_Outcome: 5-10 warm intros per month + brand awareness
Outreach_Template: Hi Lunchclub, interested in sponsoring [specific feature] where emerging founders discuss their challenges. Our writing service helps with content bottleneck that many face. Open to discussion?

Why_They_Matter: Distribution for long-form content, P3 content gets broader reach
Pitch_Angle: Publish P3 content (tool reviews) on Medium's distribution network for wider SEO reach.
Expected_Outcome: 50-100 additional readers per article + SEO juice
Outreach_Template: Hi Medium partners, I'm publishing SaaS tool reviews and want to syndicate on Medium for wider reach. Our content ranks in Google for key SaaS terms. Interested in partnership?

Why_They_Matter: 500K+ developer audience, overlap with SaaS tool users
Pitch_Angle: Cross-post tool review articles from P3 site. Dev.to audience values honest reviews.
Outreach_Template: Hi Dev.to community, I'm publishing honest reviews of SaaS tools (Jasper, ConvertKit, etc.) for developers building products. Would you feature reviews on dev.to? Link to original site in each post.

Why_They_Matter: Audience: 5K-50K subscribers interested in creator tools
Pitch_Angle: Recommend P1 templates + P2 writing service to their audience. Affiliate commission or direct referral.
Expected_Outcome: 10-30 clicks per newsletter feature + partnership credibility
Outreach_Template: Hi [Newsletter owner], your audience (creators building in public) would love our SaaS templates + writing service. Can we do a swap - I feature you in my next email, you feature us in yours?
